The '''spydr''' was an often domesticated [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] creature, native to the irradiated forest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kubindi/Legends|Kubindi]]. [[Udin]]'s hive grew them within their holdings. They were found in the [[Silver Forest of Dreams]]. The meat of the spydr was thought to be a delicacy in some cultures. The [[ghost spider]] was one spydr [[Species/Legends|species]]. One spydr was encountered by [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] in the caverns beneath a [[Bartokk]] [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].
